sql_array: CREATE TABLE t_enum_example(x Enum('apple' = 1, 'banana' = 2, 'cherry' = 3)) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS fruit_count FROM t_enum_example WHERE x = 'banana';
UPDATE t_enum_example SET x = 'cherry' WHERE x = 'apple';
SELECT CAST(x, 'Int8') FROM t_enum_example ORDER BY CAST(x, 'Int8');
